---
title: Risks and Rejected Paths
---

## Key Risks

> Expert opinion: CalDAV adoption is lower than expected in the target demographic.

- Calendar sync complexity is frequently underestimated
- Competing with Google Calendar on features is a losing strategy
- Mobile support doubles scope without doubling value

## Rejected Paths

- **Full web app**: rejected in favour of native desktop for performance
- **AI scheduling assistant**: deferred — adds scope without proving core hypothesis
